_comment: Standard Collection Pattern: COLLECTION → SUBMIT → TOOL → CONFIRMATION. Use as a sub-graph inside a larger flow. Wire node-collection-XXX from your topic-menu node, and confirmation's edges to your close/topic-menu/transfer destinations.

tools_to_add_to_flow.name: create_record
tools_to_add_to_flow.description: Create a record in the backend. Call after collecting required fields.
tools_to_add_to_flow.execution_message_description: Just a moment please, this will only take a second.

collected_fields.description: All collected fields as key-value pairs

instruction.text:
Collect these fields ONE PER TURN, acknowledging each before asking the next:

1. [Field 1] — [how to ask + confirm rule]
2. [Field 2] — ...
3. [Field 3] — ...

After the last field, say EXACTLY: "Got it — one moment." Then stop. The system transitions automatically.

GUARDRAILS:
- One question per turn
- Confirm any value already on file from {{caller_name}} etc — don't re-collect
- Never use brackets [ ] in your response
- Never deliver a closing — the SUBMIT node handles that

edges._comment: Anti-duplicate gate — fires before any prompt edge if a record was already created in this call

transition_condition.prompt: All required fields have been collected and the caller has confirmed them, OR Aubrey has just said "Got it — one moment."

instruction.text:
FIRST action when entering this node: read the reference number ONCE.

say "Your reference number is [ticket_id]. We'll review and follow up within 1 to 2 business days. Is there anything else I can help you with today?"

NEVER re-read the reference number. If the caller asks for it again, refer back briefly: "As I mentioned, your reference is [number]."

NEVER fabricate specifics about the request you weren't told.

transition_condition.prompt: Caller indicated they are done — said 'no', 'no thanks', 'that's all', 'goodbye', or similar after hearing 'Is there anything else?'
Caller has explicitly raised a DIFFERENT new topic from what was just submitted (NOT a follow-up question about the just-submitted record)

instruction.text: say "Your request for that has already been submitted in this call. Is there anything else I can help you with today?"

transition_condition.prompt: Caller said no, that's all, or similar
Caller raised a different new topic
